# Fixture-Full

A small fixture project that demonstrates a fully-arrived README — every one of
the five arrival questions is answered.

[![Build Status](https://example.com/badge.svg)](https://example.com/build)

## Audience

Maintainers of the inkwell scorer suite. This fixture exercises the
readme-quality scorer's loose-match branches.

## Installation

```bash
echo "no install needed; this is a fixture"
```

## Project Status

Active. Used as the upper-band fixture for `score-readme-quality.sh`.

## Documentation

See [docs/](docs/overview.md) for the architecture overview.
